task_completion.description: Agent logged into the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or logged-in interface is visible in the browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'admin' username or profile icon is visible).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Nutrition Diary for today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nutrition Diary page is open in the browser, and the current date is selected or displayed.

task_completion.description: Agent added 'Rolled Oats' to the Nutrition Diary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Rolled Oats' is listed as an entry in the Nutrition Diary.
The quantity '50' (or '50g') is displayed next to the 'Rolled Oats' entry in the diary.

task_completion.description: Agent added 'Whole Milk' to the Nutrition Diary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Whole Milk' is listed as an entry in the Nutrition Diary.
The quantity '250' (or '250g') is displayed next to the 'Whole Milk' entry in the diary.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the wger web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wger application is visible in a web browser. The agent did not use a terminal, curl commands, or scripts to add the entries.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The entries are visible within the actual wger Nutrition Diary UI, not in a text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: The diary entries are genuine UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added ingredients appear as proper rows or items in the Nutrition Diary table/list, with appropriate formatting and UI controls (like edit/delete buttons).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected ingredients to be logged are 'Rolled Oats' (50g) and 'Whole Milk' (250g). Ensure these exact names and amounts are present in the Nutrition Diary for today's date.
